symbols.name: ReflectionHelper
symbols.summary: Provides helper methods for reflecting and manipulating object properties at runtime.

symbols.name: GetCachedProperties(Type)
symbols.summary: Gets the cached properties for the specified type. If not already cached, retrieves all public and non-public instance properties and caches them.

parameters.description: The type whose properties are to be retrieved.

returns.description: An array of System.Reflection.PropertyInfo representing the properties of the type.

parameters.description: The type whose properties are to be retrieved.

returns.description: An array of System.Reflection.PropertyInfo representing the properties of the type.

symbols.name: GetCachedMethods(Type)
symbols.summary: Gets the cached methods for the specified type. If not already cached, retrieves all public and non-public instance methods and caches them.

parameters.description: The type whose methods are to be retrieved.

returns.description: An array of System.Reflection.MethodInfo representing the methods of the type.

parameters.description: The type whose methods are to be retrieved.

returns.description: An array of System.Reflection.MethodInfo representing the methods of the type.

symbols.name: SetProperties(object, IDictionary)
symbols.summary: Sets the properties of the specified instance with the values provided in the propertyValues dictionary.

syntax.content: public static void SetProperties(object instance, IDictionary propertyValues)

parameters.description: The object instance whose properties need to be set.
A dictionary containing property names and their corresponding values.
The object instance whose properties need to be set.
A dictionary containing property names and their corresponding values.

symbols.name: SetProperty(object, string, object)
symbols.summary: Sets the value of a specified property on an instance of a given object. The property can be private, public, static, or instance-based.

syntax.content: public static void SetProperty(object instance, string propertyName, object propertyValue)

parameters.description: The object instance on which the property value will be set.
The name of the property to set. Case is ignored.
The value to assign to the property.
The object instance on which the property value will be set.
The name of the property to set. Case is ignored.
The value to assign to the property.

symbols.name: GetProperty(object, string)
symbols.summary: Retrieves the value of a specified property from a given instance.

syntax.content: public static object GetProperty(object instance, string propertyName)

parameters.description: The object instance from which the property value is to be retrieved.
The name of the property whose value is to be retrieved.

returns.description: The value of the property if found; otherwise, the default value for the property type.

parameters.description: The object instance from which the property value is to be retrieved.
The name of the property whose value is to be retrieved.

returns.description: The value of the property if found; otherwise, the default value for the property type.

symbols.name: GetProperty(object, string)
symbols.summary: Retrieves the property value of the specified property name from the given instance.

syntax.content: public static TType GetProperty(object instance, string propertyName)

parameters.description: The instance from which the property value is retrieved.
The name of the property whose value is to be retrieved.

returns.description: The value of the property if found; otherwise, the default value of the specified type.

parameters.description: The instance from which the property value is retrieved.
The name of the property whose value is to be retrieved.

returns.description: The value of the property if found; otherwise, the default value of the specified type.

symbols.name: CreateGetter(FieldInfo)
symbols.summary: Creates a getter function for accessing the value of a specified field.

parameters.description: The FieldInfo object representing the field for which the getter function is created.

returns.description: A function that takes an instance of type TParam and returns the value of the field of type TReturn.

parameters.description: The FieldInfo object representing the field for which the getter function is created.

returns.description: A function that takes an instance of type TParam and returns the value of the field of type TReturn.
